# Olive Cover

> Olive Cover is an independent property and casualty insurance agency based in Johns Creek, Georgia. We compare home, auto, and business coverage across A-rated carriers and work for our clients, not for any one insurance company.

Olive Cover is the trade name of Olive Insurance Services, LLC, a licensed P&C agency. Agency NPN 22116940. Licensed in Georgia with expansion into additional states underway. Lead producer is Mahesh Anand (NPN 2790083).

The site is structured around three primary user goals: (1) plain-language coverage education, (2) carrier comparison and review, and (3) free coverage review consultations.

## Brand and contact

- Site: https://www.olivecover.com
- Phone: (678) 888-1011
- Email: askolive@olivecover.com
- Address: 6470 East Johns Crossing Suite 160, Johns Creek GA 30097

## Core pages

- [Free Coverage Review](https://www.olivecover.com/coverage-review): 5-minute structured intake for a free coverage consultation
- [About Olive Cover](https://www.olivecover.com/about): independent agency model, team, philosophy
- [Contact](https://www.olivecover.com/contact): phone, email, address, contact form
- [Claims](https://www.olivecover.com/claims): claims handling guidance, what to do in the first 24 hours, how Olive Cover advocates for clients
- [Insights](https://www.olivecover.com/insights): coverage guides and local insurance market analysis
- [Insurance Terms Glossary](https://www.olivecover.com/insurance-terms): 69 plain-language definitions of common insurance terms

## FAQ

- [Insurance FAQ Hub](https://www.olivecover.com/faq): plain-language answers to common questions about coverage, claims, deductibles, and the independent agency model

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://www.olivecover.com/sitemap.xml): full URL inventory in XML format

## Editorial principles

- All content is written in plain language at roughly an 8th-grade reading level
- We do not use insurance jargon outside the glossary; consumer-friendly terms are preferred
- Rating data is sourced from publicly available industry information and is provided for educational purposes only
- Our independence from any single carrier is the core value proposition; client interests are prioritized over carrier loyalty
- Pricing examples and coverage details are educational, not specific quotes; actual policy quotes require a Free Coverage Review consultation
